title: La dama duende
writer: Rafael Alberti, Pedro Calderón de la Barca, María Teresa León
actors: Manuel Collado, Helena Cortesina, Alberto de Mendoza
plot: Doña Ángelica - a young widow recently 18 years old - falls in love and wants to marry an army officer named Don Manuel, but to do so she must evade the vigilance of her sister-in-law who wishes to send her to the convent for the ...
